title: pedicularis shawii
intro: Pedicularis shawii, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a plant species that belongs to the bumblebee genus and is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pedicularis shawii include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and respiratory issues, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Pedicularis shawii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
